title: galphimia angustifolia var. oblongifolia
intro: Galphimia angustifolia var. oblongifolia, also known as Mexican gentian or yellow gentian, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Galphimia angustifolia var. oblongifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Galphimia angustifolia var. oblongifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
